items.question: How do I register?
items.answer: Simply choose a membership plan and contact us on WhatsApp. Our team will guide you through the complete registration process and help create your profile.

items.question: Are all profiles verified?
items.answer: Yes, every profile is manually reviewed and verified before being published on the platform to ensure authenticity and trust.

items.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade your membership plan at any time by contacting our support team on WhatsApp.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept UPI, Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, bank transfers, and other secure digital payment methods.

hero.title: Real Love, Real Happy Endings
hero.description: These beautiful couples found their life partners through Apna Vivah.

stories.story: We both were looking for someone who understood our values and traditions. Apna Vivah connected us, and within three months, our families met. Today, we are happily married and grateful for this platform.
After searching for two years on other platforms, we found each other through Apna Vivah. The personal attention from Vinod Ji made all the difference.
What we loved about Apna Vivah was how they understood our community values. The matching was perfect.
The premium membership was worth every rupee. We received personalized recommendations that truly matched our preferences.
Our parents were worried about finding a suitable match. Apna Vivah's verification process gave them complete confidence.
Quick, efficient, and trustworthy. Within weeks of registering, we found our perfect match.
